attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate memory
    authors:
      - 0x534a@mailbox.org
    lib: true
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 03-03.exe_:0x4010EA
      # ntdll
      - 563653399B82CD443F120ECEFF836EA3678D4CF11D9B351BB737573C2D856299:0x140001ABA
  features:
    - or:
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAlloc
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocEx
      - api: kernel32.VirtualAllocExNuma
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtect
      - api: kernel32.VirtualProtectEx
      - api: NtAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: ZwAllocateVirtualMemory
      - api: NtMapViewOfSection
      - api: ZwMapViewOfSection
signature_matches.name: allocate memory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate RWX memory
    namespace: host-interaction/process/inject
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 03-03.exe_:0x4010EA
      # ntdll
      - 563653399B82CD443F120ECEFF836EA3678D4CF11D9B351BB737573C2D856299:0x140001ABA
  features:
    - and:
      - match: allocate memory
      - number: 0x40 = PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE
signature_matches.name: allocate RWX memory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: allocate RW memory
    authors:
      - 0x534a@mailbox.org
    lib: true
    scope: basic block
    mbc:
      - Memory::Allocate Memory [C0007]
    examples:
      - Practical Malware Analysis Lab 17-02.dll_:0x1000D10D
  features:
    - and:
      - match: allocate memory
      - number: 0x4 = PAGE_READWRITE
signature_matches.name: allocate RW memory

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: encode data using Base64 via WinAPI
    namespace: data-manipulation/encoding/base64
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: basic block
    att&ck:
      - Defense Evasion::Obfuscated Files or Information [T1027]
    examples:
      - mimikatz.exe_:0x40622D
  features:
    - and:
      - number: 1 = dwFlags=CRYPT_STRING_BASE64
      - api: CryptBinaryToString
signature_matches.name: encode data using Base64 via WinAPI

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: contain loop
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: function
    examples:
      - 08AC667C65D36D6542917655571E61C8:0x406EAA
  features:
    - or:
      - characteristic: loop
      - characteristic: tight loop
      - characteristic: recursive call
signature_matches.name: contain loop

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: initialize Winsock library
    namespace: communication/socket
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    scope: function
    mbc:
      - Communication::Socket Communication::Initialize Winsock Library [C0001.009]
    examples:
      - 6A352C3E55E8AE5ED39DC1BE7FB964B1:0x10001D30
  features:
    - and:
      - api: ws2_32.WSAStartup
signature_matches.name: initialize Winsock library

refs.value: encode data using Base64 via WinAPI
